title: Tama and the Alliance Shift the Battle
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Big Mom, Nami, Kaido, Unknown person #6, Luffy as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom
dialogue.text: Mamamama hahaha, aren't you just the cutest,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What was that useless OAF, ZEUS, doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That airhead is always holding us back!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: ...Mama, I have a favor to ask.

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: WORORORORO!! Look at Straw Hat's Face!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But he's still glaring at me!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm going to gauge his eyes out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...or cave in his skull. Maybe I'll just crush his heart?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: weez, weez. This next attack...I will be my last.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: We can't keep this up forever.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this doesn't work, and I end up dead, it'll be up to you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That's my captain you got there!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: what.. what the hell do you mean?! weez, weez....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I don't know what you're talking about!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I just put every- thing I had into that assault...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huff, huff... ...I was hoping it'd at least be enough to knock you down!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 48 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
